summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Shivdhara Charitable Trust bilingual NGO website. All major features are working correctly including homepage, navigation, donation system, language switcher, and admin security.
passed_tests: Homepage loads with logo, hero section, impact stats, programs, stories, blog preview
Language switcher toggles between English and Gujarati successfully
Navigation menu works for all pages (Home, About, Gallery, Success Stories, Blog, Contact, Donate)
Donate page shows amount selection buttons (₹501, ₹1001, ₹2501, ₹5001, ₹11001)
Donate page has functional donor info form (Name, Email, Phone)
80G checkbox shows additional form fields when checked and all fields are fillable
Contact page loads with functional contact form
Gallery page loads with 14 images and proper categorization
Success stories page loads with story content and filtering
Blog page loads with blog posts and proper layout
About page loads with vision, mission, values content
Login page works with proper form fields
Admin panel properly redirects to login when not authenticated (security working)
Footer displays properly with trust info, contact details, and bank information
All form fields are accessible and functional
